content:
• Choose your favorite rewritten logline and expand it into a one-page synopsis.
• Send me an email or message with your logline, structure choice, and any roadblocks you’re hitting.
• Let’s refine and workshop it together.

Would you like this as a formatted PDF workbook with a story graph template and structure worksheets?

The Graphic Novel Writing Guide for Derek: A Step-by-Step Approach to Inspiration, Structure, and Execution

This guide will take you through a structured creative process, moving from inspiration to execution. Each section will combine theory, detailed examples, and targeted activities to develop your graphic novel idea with depth, clarity, and momentum.

We’ll follow this logical order, making sure each step builds on the previous one:
1. Understanding the Foundations of a Great Story
2. Studying Your Inspirations (Breakdowns of Whiplash, Real, Vagabond + 4th option)
3. Generating Your Own Story Idea (Loglines and Variations)
4. Expanding an Idea (From Logline to Structure: Three-Act, Hero’s Journey, Kishōtenketsu)
